pageContext.name: Nemesis Prime Nendoroid
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Sentinel are excited to present the Nemesis Prime Collectible Figure to join the Nendoroid series!  From the 'Transformers' series comes a Nendoroid of Nemesis Prime, the evil clone of Optimus Prime, and a loyal servant of Unicron!  The Nendoroid is fully articulated, allowing you to create multiple action poses! Optional parts include a gun and an energy axe. Enjoy creating all kinds of poses and situations, like scenes of Nemesis Prime and Optimus Prime engaged in combat!  Don't miss your chance to add this Nemesis Prime Collectible Figure to your Nendoroid collection today!
